finding: TABLE_ROW SVCNTMOD at p.87 top. Controlled Terms cell in atom reads 'C\(NCI\)GCD' but PDF shows '(CNTMODE)' (hyperlinked CT codelist name). All other fields (Contact Mode, Char, Record Qualifier, description, Perm) match. atom_type TABLE_ROW correct, parent_section §5.5 SV correct.

finding: TABLE_ROW row 5 of ds.xpt at p.90 top. All cell values correct verbatim (5, 123456, DS, 101, 1, INFORMED CONSENT OBTAINED, INFORMED CONSENT OBTAINED, PROTOCOL MILESTONE, SCREENING, 2020-02-13, empty, 2020-02-13, -6). However, ds.xpt has 13 cols per p.89 header (DSSCAT between DSCAT and EPOCH), so for row 5 DSSCAT should be empty. Atom pipe-count shows 13 fields if empty DSSCAT is collapsed between 'PROTOCOL MILESTONE' and 'SCREENING' — but inspection of PDF p.90 row 5 confirms DSSCAT IS empty for this row (unlike row 6 WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT which has STUDY PARTICIPATION in DSSCAT). Therefore the 13-field pipe structure is actually structurally consistent with empty DSSCAT. MINOR drift: ambiguity in empty cell representation — reader cannot distinguish empty DSSCAT from missing column. Recommend using explicit empty-cell marker ('| |') consistently for non-populated intermediate cells.
pdf_quote: 5 | 123456 | DS | 101 | 1 | INFORMED CONSENT OBTAINED | INFORMED CONSENT OBTAINED | PROTOCOL MILESTONE | | SCREENING | 2020-02-13 | 2020-02-13 | -6
